figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of the Prototype-Regularized Federated Learning Framework for Cross-Domain ASTE.

Table 3: Performance comparison of different models on ASTE datasets. P , R, and F1 denote Precision, Recall, and F1-score. The second best F1 results are underlined. The symbol “†” indicates results retrieved from (Liang et al., 2023).The symbol “⋄ ” indicates results retrieved from their respective original papers.
Table 1: Prototype labels derived from the threedimensional span tagging scheme, where ts ̸= N indicates the span expresses a sentiment.
